Label: Statement
Description: A reified RDF statement (subject-predicate-object) representing a single relationship edge and carrying edge-level attributes such as author position, provenance (derived), and weight. Used to attach properties to AUTHORED_BY, CO_USED_WITH, and WORKS_WITH_DATASET relationships.

Label: Author
Description: Represents an author of a scientific publication, identified where possible by ORCID and OpenAlex identifiers and linked to the institutions they are affiliated with.

Label: Data Center
Description: Represents data centers, primarily NASA DAACs (Distributed Active Archive Centers), as well as other data providers in academia and government that manage and distribute datasets.

Label: Dataset
Description: Represents individual satellite datasets and data collections managed and distributed by NASA data centers and other providers worldwide.

Label: Institution
Description: Represents a research institution or organization, identified where possible by ROR and OpenAlex identifiers, with which authors are affiliated and which work with datasets.

Label: Instrument
Description: Represents scientific instruments and sensors carried on platforms to collect Earth observation data.

Label: Platform
Description: Represents satellites, spacecraft, and other platforms that carry scientific instruments for data collection.

Label: Project
Description: Represents scientific missions and research projects associated with data collection and satellite operations.

Label: Publication
Description: Represents scientific publications and research papers that cite or use datasets in the knowledge graph.

Label: Science Keyword
Description: Represents scientific keywords and terms (GCMD-style) used to categorize and describe datasets by their sphere of application and research domain, organized in a keyword hierarchy.

Label: accrual periodicity
Description: The frequency with which items are added to a dataset (e.g., how often the data collection is updated). Dublin Core Terms.

Label: identifier
Description: An unambiguous reference (identifier) for the resource within a given context. Applied across all entity types. Dublin Core Terms.

Label: subject
Description: The topic of the resource, typically expressed as a science keyword or classification term. Dublin Core Terms.

Label: type
Description: The nature or genre of the resource. Dublin Core Terms.

Label: doi
Description: The Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the dataset or publication. Bibliographic Ontology (BIBO).

Label: object
Description: The entity in the object position of a reified statement (rdf:Statement).

Label: predicate
Description: The relationship type (a predicate IRI, such as AUTHORED_BY, CO_USED_WITH, or WORKS_WITH_DATASET) asserted by a reified statement.

Label: subject
Description: The entity in the subject position of a reified statement (rdf:Statement).

Label: label
Description: A human-readable name or label for the resource. Applied across all entity types. RDF Schema.

Label: year
Description: The year associated with a resource, such as a publication's year of publication. OWL Time Ontology.

Label: AFFILIATED_WITH
Description: Links an Author to an Institution they are affiliated with.

Label: AUTHORED_BY
Description: Links a Publication to an Author who wrote it. Reified statements of this relationship carry the author's position in the author list.

Label: CITES
Description: Represents a citation relationship between Publication nodes, indicating that one publication cites another.

Label: CO_USED_WITH
Description: Links two Datasets that are used together in the same research, indicating co-usage. Reified statements of this relationship carry a weight and a derived flag.

Label: HAS_APPLIEDRESEARCHAREA
Description: Associates a Publication with a ScienceKeyword representing its applied research area or domain.

Label: HAS_DATASET
Description: Connects a DataCenter to the Dataset(s) it manages and distributes.

Label: HAS_INSTRUMENT
Description: Connects a Platform to an Instrument it carries.

Label: HAS_PLATFORM
Description: Associates a Dataset with the Platform (satellite or spacecraft) that collected it.

Label: HAS_SCIENCEKEYWORD
Description: Links a Dataset to a ScienceKeyword, categorizing the dataset by its scientific domain and application.

Label: HAS_SUBCATEGORY
Description: Defines hierarchical parent-child relationships between ScienceKeyword nodes in the keyword taxonomy.

Label: OF_PROJECT
Description: Links a Dataset to the Project (scientific mission) it belongs to.

Label: USES_DATASET
Description: Connects a Publication to a Dataset it references or uses.

Label: WORKS_WITH_DATASET
Description: Links an Author or Institution to a Dataset they work with. Reified statements of this relationship carry a weight and a derived flag.

Label: author position
Description: Edge attribute on a reified AUTHORED_BY statement giving the author's position in the author list (e.g., first, middle, last).

Label: authors
Description: A textual list of the authors of a Publication.

Label: citers fetched
Description: A boolean flag indicating whether the citing works for a Dataset or Publication have been fetched during crawling.

Label: cmr id
Description: The Common Metadata Repository (CMR) identifier for a dataset in NASA's data management system.

Label: country
Description: The country of an Institution, given as a country code.

Label: crawl hop
Description: The crawl-hop distance at which a Publication was discovered during citation crawling.

Label: daac
Description: Identifies the Distributed Active Archive Center (DAAC) responsible for archiving and distributing the dataset.

Label: derived
Description: Edge attribute on a reified CO_USED_WITH or WORKS_WITH_DATASET statement; a boolean flag indicating whether the relationship was derived (inferred) rather than directly asserted.

Label: openalex id
Description: The OpenAlex identifier (URL) for an Author or Institution.

Label: orcid
Description: The ORCID identifier (URL) of an Author.

Label: ror
Description: The Research Organization Registry (ROR) identifier (URL) of an Institution.

Label: source
Description: The provenance of a Publication record, indicating how it was obtained (e.g., citation-crawl).

Label: weight
Description: Edge attribute on a reified CO_USED_WITH or WORKS_WITH_DATASET statement; a numeric weight quantifying the strength of the relationship.

Label: abstract
Description: A summary or abstract describing the content of a Dataset or Publication. Schema.org.

Label: end date
Description: The end date of a Dataset's temporal coverage. Schema.org.

Label: start date
Description: The start date of a Dataset's temporal coverage. Schema.org.

Label: title
Description: The title of a Publication. Schema.org.

Label: url
Description: A URL providing access to a DataCenter or additional information about it. Schema.org.
